subject: [PATCH v6 10/22] swap: move swap cache to virtual swap descriptor

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch moves the swap cache and workingset shadow for anonymous pages to the virtual swap descriptor, effectively range-partitioning the swap cache by virtual swap clusters of PMD size. This change eliminates lock contention in the swap cache. The patch modifies several kernel files, including huge_memory.c, migrate.c, shmem.c, swap.h, swap_state.c, vmscan.c, and vswap.c.
